package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_handles_request_binding_or_header_extraction: Services that extract headers, cookies, forms, or route params directly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule172NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule172NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule172NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario172Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule172NegativeService, input Rule172NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
